recommended_claim: PRISM outperforms PRISM-V2, PRISM-V3a, PRISM-V1, PRISM-V0 on MAE, while none remain strong short-horizon competitors. This indicates that memecoin forecasting is strongly influenced by local price continuity, and that PRISM is better interpreted as a risk-aware, multimodal, and diversified forecasting framework rather than as a universally dominant point forecaster.
quality_gate_warnings: MIS size <= 1 (needs >= 200 tokens for meaningful diversification)
